zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Hugh FitzRalph於1195年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾素斯 列福頓時，他的父親Ralph De Wandesley II42歲，母親Baroness Agnes de Greasley38歲。他於1228年與Agnes de Gresley結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1261年4月28日在英國諾廷加姆爾巴斯福德享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾格亞斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Hugh FitzRalph于1195年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾素斯 列福頓时，他的父亲Ralph De Wandesley II42岁，母亲Baroness Agnes de Greasley38岁。他于1228年与Agnes de Gresley结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1261年4月28日在英国諾廷加姆爾巴斯福德享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾格亞斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Hugh FitzRalph was born in 1195, in South Leverton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Ralph De Wandesley II, was 42 and his mother, Baroness Agnes de Greasley, was 38. He married Agnes de Gresley in 1228. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 April 1261, in Basford, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Greasley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Hugh FitzRalph est né en 1195, à South Leverton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph De Wandesley II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Baroness Agnes de Greasley, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Gresley en 1228. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 avril 1261, à Basford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Greasley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Hugh FitzRalph 1195 in South Leverton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph De Wandesley II 42 und seine Mutter Baroness Agnes de Greasley 38. Er hat 1228 Agnes de Gresley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. April 1261 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Basford, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Greasley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Hugh FitzRalph è nato il nel 1195 nel South Leverton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph De Wandesley II, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Agnes de Greasley, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Gresley nel 1228. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 aprile 1261, nel Basford, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Greasley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Hugh FitzRalphが1195年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウス レバートンで生まれた時，父Ralph De Wandesley IIは42歳，母Baroness Agnes de Greasleyは38歳であった。1228年にAgnes de Gresleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1261年4月28日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアバスフォードで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアグレアスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Hugh FitzRalph(이)가 1195년 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스 레버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph De Wandesley II(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Agnes de Greasley(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1228년 Agnes de Gresley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1261년 4월 28일 영국 노틴그함실르 바스퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 그리슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Hugh FitzRalph nasceu em 1195, em South Leverton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph De Wandesley II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Agnes de Greasley, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Gresley em 1228. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de abril de 1261, em Basford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Greasley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Hugh FitzRalph родился в 1195 г. в местности соут ливиртон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph De Wandesley II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Agnes de Greasley, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Gresley в 1228 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 апреля 1261 г. в местности басфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности грисли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Hugh FitzRalph nació en 1195, en South Leverton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph De Wandesley II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Baroness Agnes de Greasley, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Agnes de Gresley en 1228. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de abril de 1261, en Basford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Greasley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
